mano_cua.result_summary: 未登录访问/settings显示TRPCError: UNAUTHORIZED运行时错误（暴露服务器堆栈信息），而非重定向到登录页。登录后访问仍报JWT_SESSION_ERROR(decryption operation failed)。根路径/正确重定向到/signin，但/settings未做同样处理。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Unauthenticated access to /settings shows Runtime Error with TRPCError: UNAUTHORIZED and exposes server stack trace instead of redirecting to /signin. After login, /settings still throws JWT_SESSION_ERROR (decryption operation failed). Root path / correctly redirects to /signin but /settings does not have the same access control.
